## Summary

Briefly explain what changed and why.

## Guardrail checks

- [ ] I ran `npm run lint`
- [ ] I ran `npm run verify`

## Planning trigger

Select exactly one option:

- [ ] Planning Gate Required
- [ ] Planning Gate Exempt

If **Planning Gate Required** is selected, complete all planning sections below.
If **Planning Gate Exempt** is selected, complete **Exemption rationale** and you may use `N/A` for planning sections.

## Exemption rationale

Provide rationale when exempt. Otherwise use `N/A`.

## Objective

State the objective clearly.

## Scope

- In scope:
- Out of scope:
- Non-goals:

## Discovery summary

Summarise the existing files/routes/endpoints/data paths/contracts reviewed before coding.

## Conflict check

List potential collisions (API/data/auth/admin/UI) and mitigation approach.

## Implementation approach

Describe planned implementation steps and sequencing.

## Verification plan

List local/CI checks and expected outcomes.

## Rollback plan

Describe how to revert safely if issues are found.

## Plan doc (optional)

Link long-form plan doc if used (for example: `docs/plans/<name>.md`).

## Notes for reviewer

Any risks, follow-ups, or manual checks.
